title: Field-station support normalization follow-up
summary: The first field-station state split is structurally sound, but the extracted helper dropped the old outing-support normalization. This follow-up restores the prior save-safe behavior before the next controller split wave continues.

execution_order.goal: Restore outing-support normalization in the new field-station state helper.
execution_order.why_now: The split should not regress older or partially unlocked saves before the next controller handoff.
The controller split wave should close cleanly before lane 1 advances to the second extraction handoff.

guardrails: Keep the helper pure and behavior-preserving.
Do not reopen the broader controller split during this follow-up.
Add one regression that proves locked outing supports still fall back safely.
